issues.sample: MY 2016 INDIAN CHIEFTAIN THAT HAS @7500 MILES DISPLAY FLICKERS.  THIS HAPPENS WHEN THE THROTTLE IS OPERATED IN ALL CONDITIONS.  I HAVE BEEN INFORMED THAT NUMEROUS CHIEFTAINS WERE IN THE SHOP FOR THE SAME REASON.   IT'S BEEN IN THE SHOP SINCE SEPTEMBER 29TH.

narrative.headline: What 2016 Indian Chieftain owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (100% of reports).
